## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Double confirmation needed for published content; ping client channels for visibility](https://fathom.video/share/fUTWMxKBPwsRBzSozezS_kkyJMb6ZH7_?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

  - [Design resources being hired for custom graphics, especially for high-profile clients](https://fathom.video/share/fUTWMxKBPwsRBzSozezS_kkyJMb6ZH7_?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
